channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sarah Chalke Says She Was 'Young and Naive' to Think Taking Over Becky Role on “Roseanne” Wouldn’t Come with Backlash
item.description: The sitcom first aired on ABC in 1988, with Chalke replacing Lecy Goranson in season 6

item.title: “The Pink Panther ”Director Shawn Levy Shares How the Crime Comedy Inspired His Marvel Movie (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'Deadpool & Wolverine' filmmaker is grateful for the 2006 movie, which celebrated its 20th anniversary in February

item.title: Nicole Kidman’s Unofficial Travel Uniform Includes Classic White Sneakers — These Lookalike Pairs Start at $23
item.description: This is the second style we've spotted her in this year

item.title: Leigh-Anne Pinnock Explains Why She’s Chosen Not to Share Her Twin Daughters’ Names or Faces Publicly (Exclusive)
item.description: Pinnock, whose debut solo album 'My Ego Told Me To' is out now, explains the decision to PEOPLE

item.title: Kate Middleton Attends Rugby Match in First Appearance After Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest
item.description: The Princess of Wales attended the England vs. Ireland Six Nations Match on Saturday, Feb. 21

item.title: 'American Idol' Alum Caleb Flynn Allegedly Killed Wife While Kids Slept Nearby
item.description: The "American Idol" alum charged with murdering his wife allegedly shot her inside their Ohio home while their two children slept in another room, acc...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie Abduction: Timeline of Events
item.description: Nancy left in an Uber at 5:32 PM to have dinner at her daughter Annie's house in Tucson, Arizona. At 9:48 PM, Nancy's son-in-law, Tommaso Cioni, dropp...

item.title: 'RHOC's Meghan King Accuses Jim Edmonds of Leaking Her Number to Sex Workers
item.description: 'Real Housewives of Orange County' alum Meghan King accused her ex-husband Jim Edmonds of leaking her cell phone to sex workers to harass her years ag...

item.title: Gabourey Sidibe’s Husband Reveals Thyroid Cancer Diagnosis
item.description: Gabourey Sidibe’s husband -- Brandon Frankel -- has revealed he’s battling Stage 1 papillary thyroid cancer ... and he says pushing doctors to listen ...

item.title: Baseball Hall of Famer Bill Mazeroski Dead at 89
item.description: Bill Mazeroski -- Pittsburgh Pirates legend and Baseball Hall of Famer -- has died at the age of 89. The Pirates issued a statement announcing his dea...
